title: phegopteris prolifera
intro: Phegopteris prolifera, also known as the autumn fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phegopteris prolifera include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and even alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Phegopteris prolifera can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a popular natural remedy in traditional medicine.
